summary: Comprehensive testing of event registration management page. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified - stats, filters, table, detail modal, accommodation assignment modal, export buttons, email/WhatsApp notifications.
seed_data_creation: Temporary E2E test room assignment (E2E-999-Z) created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event registration management page fully tested. All features working: 1) Registration list with complete details 2) All filters (search, payment, member type, accommodation, category) 3) Export Excel/PDF/Accommodation buttons 4) Admin accommodation assignment modal with location type, location name, room number, map link fields 5) Email sends (fails gracefully if SMTP not configured) 6) WhatsApp generates wa.me URL correctly 7) Bulk email option available. Email/WhatsApp icons only appear after room is assigned.

backend_registration_management.GET registrations list: PASSED - Returns 10 registrations with all fields
backend_registration_management.PUT accommodation assignment: PASSED - Saves room_no, location, location_type, map_link
backend_registration_management.Export PDF registrations: PASSED - Returns valid PDF starting with %PDF
backend_registration_management.Export Accommodation report: PASSED - Returns Excel with accommodation data
backend_registration_management.Send WhatsApp: PASSED - Returns wa.me URL with formatted message
backend_registration_management.Send Email: PASSED - Attempts send (fails gracefully if SMTP not configured)
backend_registration_management.Bulk send accommodation: PASSED - Works for both email and whatsapp channels

frontend_registrations_page.Stats cards: PASSED - Shows Total (10), Paid (1), Pending (9), Revenue (₹53,300), Need Accom (7), Assigned
frontend_registrations_page.Search filter: PASSED - Filters by name, email, phone
frontend_registrations_page.Click name opens detail modal: PASSED - Shows all registration info including assigned accommodation
frontend_registrations_page.Hotel icon opens accommodation modal: PASSED - Shows form with location_type, location, room_no, map_link
frontend_registrations_page.Save accommodation updates: PASSED - Updates registrant and shows in table
frontend_registrations_page.Email/WhatsApp icons visibility: PASSED - Only appear after room is assigned

frontend_events_admin.Link to registrations page: PASSED - Registrations button uses Link component and navigates correctly

frontend_app_routing.Route /admin/events/:eventId/registratio: PASSED - Route exists and renders EventRegistrations component

backend_tests: TestSendAccommodation - 3 tests PASSED (WhatsApp, Email, Invalid channel)
frontend_tests: Login and navigation to registrations page - PASSED
All filter components present and functional - PASSED
Detail modal opens on name click - PASSED
